mapper.select:
select * from property_deals
deal_type = #{dealType} and lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} and umd_nm like concat('%', #{dong}, '%') and house_name like concat('%', #{houseName}, '%')
and deal_year = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 1, 4) as unsigned) and deal_month = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 5, 2) as unsigned)
order by deal_year desc, deal_month desc, deal_day desc, id desc limit 200

select deal_type, count(*) as deal_count, min(deal_amount) as min_deal_amount, round(avg(deal_amount)) as avg_deal_amount, max(deal_amount) as max_deal_amount, round(avg(deposit)) as avg_deposit, round(avg(monthly_rent)) as avg_monthly_rent, round(avg(exclusive_area), 2) as avg_exclusive_area, round(avg(case when deal_amount is not null and exclusive_area is not null and exclusive_area > 0 then deal_amount / exclusive_area end), 2) as avg_price_per_square_meter from property_deals where lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} and deal_year = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 1, 4) as unsigned) and deal_month = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 5, 2) as unsigned) group by deal_type order by deal_type
